overall.description: A first-person exploration of the Hawaii State Capitol building in a game engine (Microsoft Flight Simulator), showing the modernist architecture with its distinctive columns and open-air courtyard. The camera approaches from an open park area, circles the perimeter, and enters the central courtyard to look up at the sky well.

scene_state.functional_zone: open park lawn approaching government building

events.description: text overlay 'HAWAII STATE CAPITAL' appears briefly then disappears
camera turns slightly right to follow building perimeter

agents.ego_description: approaching the capitol building from the open park area, moving steadily across the grass lawn

entered.detail: modernist concrete building with vertical columns and louvers, the main subject of the scene
tall red and beige high-rise buildings visible in the background
scattered green trees lining the edge of the park area
green grass with patches of dirt forming the park ground surface

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a title card identifying the Hawaii State Capitol. The camera moves forward across an open park lawn toward the modernist capitol building, with downtown skyscrapers visible to the right and scattered trees to the left. The scene is bright and sunny with clear skies.

scene_state.functional_zone: building perimeter walkway with stone sculptures

events.description: moving from open park grass to paved building perimeter walkway
camera turns to face the columned entrance directly and approaches the covered area

agents.ego_description: moving along the building facade toward the columned entrance, passing large stone sculptures

entered.detail: tall white concrete support columns of the capitol building facade
large rounded stone bench sculptures placed near the building entrance
grey tiled stone pavement replacing the grass lawn

segments.scene_description: The camera transitions from the grassy park to a paved walkway along the capitol building's perimeter. Large stone sculptures and benches appear near the entrance as the camera approaches the massive white concrete columns. The downtown skyscrapers remain visible in the background before the camera focuses on the building entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: interior courtyard with reflecting pool and open sky well

events.description: entering the covered interior courtyard beneath the capitol building
camera tilts upward to look directly up at the central sky well opening

agents.ego_description: walking through the interior courtyard, examining the architecture and looking up at the sky well

entered.detail: large rectangular opening in the building roof showing blue sky above
multi-level walkways and railings visible on the interior building walls
shallow water feature with stone benches alongside it

segments.scene_description: The camera enters the distinctive open-air interior courtyard of the capitol building, moving beneath the concrete structure. Large stone sculptures and a reflecting pool are visible on the tiled ground. The camera then tilts upward to reveal the dramatic central sky well, showing the blue sky framed by the building's upper balconies and architectural details.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a wide, sunny park landscape into the dramatic, open-air interior of the Hawaii State Capitol. It begins by gliding across an open lawn toward the modernist building, with downtown skyscrapers and scattered trees framing the approach under a clear sky. As the camera transitions from the grass to a paved walkway, the view shifts toward the building's perimeter, passing stone sculptures and benches before approaching the massive white concrete columns. The scene then moves beneath the structure and into the central courtyard, passing a reflecting pool on the tiled ground. Finally, the camera tilts upward to reveal the central sky well, framing the blue sky through the building's upper balconies and architectural details.
